query:
SELECT 
    code,
    esrsStandard,
    disclosureRequirement,
    name,
    dataType,
    mandatory,
    voluntary
FROM esrs_datapoints
WHERE name LIKE '%product%' 
   OR name LIKE '%material%' 
   OR name LIKE '%packaging%'
   OR name LIKE '%supply%'
   OR name LIKE '%chain%'
   OR name LIKE '%waste%'
   OR name LIKE '%recycl%'
   OR name LIKE '%circular%'
   OR name LIKE '%emission%'
   OR name LIKE '%footprint%'
LIMIT 50
